welcome.title: Welcome to Floussy! 🎉
welcome.content: Let us give you a quick tour of the app to help you manage your finances easily. Let's go!

header.title: Your personal space
header.content: Here you can see your profile, a summary of your current month and your balance.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.content: Add an income or expense with a single click. This is the fastest way to record your transactions.

summaryCards.title: Monthly summary
summaryCards.content: These cards show your total income, total expenses and net balance for the current month.

chart.title: Trend chart
chart.content: Visualize how your income and expenses have evolved over the last 6 months.

history.title: Transaction history
history.content: All your recent transactions are listed here. Click 'Load more' to see older ones.

incomes.title: Incomes
incomes.content: Manage all your income sources: salary, freelance, investments... Add, edit or delete entries.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.content: Track all your expenses. You can also take a photo of the receipt for each expense.

recurring.title: Fixed operations
recurring.content: Set up recurring transactions (salary, rent, subscriptions). They will be automatically added each month.

goals.title: Savings goals
goals.content: Set financial goals and track your progress. E.g.: buy a car, vacation...

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.content: Create budgets by category to control your spending. Get alerts when you approach the limit.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.content: View detailed reports on your finances: charts, trends and comparisons.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.content: Send us your thoughts, feature requests or bug reports. Your feedback helps us improve the app!

settings.title: Settings
settings.content: Customize the app: default currency, language, notifications and more.

mobileNav.title: Navigation
mobileNav.content: Use the ☰ menu at the top left to navigate between pages: Incomes, Expenses, Fixed Operations, Goals, Budgets, Reports, Feedback and Settings.

done.title: You're all set! 🚀
done.content: You now know the basics of Floussy. Start by adding your fixed operations (salary, rent) for automatic tracking!
